touches.ai_summary: Outreach via LinkedIn to Cameron Okafor at VelocityOps. Introduced our CRM automation platform and mentioned we help eCommerce companies streamline their RevOps workflows. Cameron responded positively and agreed to continue the conversation over email.
next_steps: Follow up via email with more details on use cases

touches.ai_summary: Email follow-up sharing case study of similar eCommerce company. Cameron replied expressing interest in automating their current manual CRM processes and asked about integration capabilities with their existing stack.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with Shopify and our existing CRM?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with Shopify and all major CRMs including Salesforce and HubSpot

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to map out current workflow

touches.ai_summary: Email exchange to schedule discovery. Cameron mentioned they're currently evaluating Fireflies as well but is interested in our consulting services on top of automation. Confirmed availability for deeper technical discussion.

questions_asked.question: How does your consulting package differ from just the automation tool?
questions_asked.answer: Our consulting team helps design custom workflows and provides ongoing optimization - it's hands-on implementation support vs. self-service

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up email. Cameron confirmed the automations would solve their manual data entry pain points. Requested pricing for 6 seats with the consulting package. Mentioned budget constraints and asked about flexibility on pricing given they're comparing with Fireflies.

questions_asked.question: What's your pricing for 6 seats with the consulting add-on, and is there room for negotiation?
questions_asked.answer: Standard pricing is $6,935 ACV for 6 seats with consulting. We can discuss volume discounts and payment terms to fit your budget

next_steps: Send custom proposal with pricing options

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation via email. Cameron pushed back on initial quote, citing Fireflies' lower cost. We offered 38% discount to $4,300 ACV to match their budget. Cameron appreciated the flexibility and said he'd need to run it by leadership before signing.

questions_asked.question: Can you match closer to Fireflies pricing while keeping the consulting included?
questions_asked.answer: We can bring it down to $4,300 ACV to work within your budget and keep full consulting support

objections: Initial pricing too high compared to Fireflies
next_steps: Cameron to review with leadership, circle back by end of week

touches.ai_summary: 33-minute exec alignment meeting with Cameron. Walked through implementation timeline, ROI projections, and contract terms. Cameron confirmed he has budget approval at the discounted rate and is ready to move forward. He'll be primary point of contact through onboarding. Discussed kickoff timeline for next month.

questions_asked.question: What does the implementation timeline look like with the consulting package?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks for full setup with consulting - we assign a dedicated consultant for your workflow design

questions_asked.question: Will we have executive sponsor involvement during implementation or are you driving this internally?
questions_asked.answer: I'll be owning this end-to-end - I have the budget approval and will coordinate with our ops team

next_steps: Schedule kickoff call with consulting team

outcome.churn_reason: did not see enough ROI for the price
